name: Hometown
description: Cheap enough to breathe, familiar enough to feel stuck, and full of fallback options if family stays on your side.
opportunity_text: Cheap housing and family fallback make it easier to stabilize early.
pressure_text: Ceilings arrive sooner, and staying too long can start to feel like drifting.

name: Mid-Size City
description: A balanced place to build. Costs are manageable, options are steady, and nothing comes easy for free.
opportunity_text: Steady jobs and moderate rents make this the most forgiving long-game city.
pressure_text: You can survive here without a plan, but you will not surge forward by accident.

name: Big Metro
description: Higher ceilings, harsher costs, and a lifestyle that rewards momentum but punishes sloppy money.
opportunity_text: The biggest upside is here if you can survive the rent, debt, and pace.
pressure_text: Everything costs more, and weak plans unravel fast.
